Example Reports

Source: vignettes/articles/example_reports.qmd

The following reports have been made using asar. Please let us know if you’d like us to add your own report to this list!

  • “Status of the Rougheye and Blackspotted Rockfishes stock off the U.S. West Coast in 2025” by Jason M. Cope, Vladlena Gertseva, R. Claire Rosemond, Alison D. Whitman, and Fabio P. Caltabellotta

  • “Status of Quillback Rockfish in U.S. Waters off California in 2025” by Brian J. Langseth*, Melissa H. Monk*, and Julia H. Coates

Developed by Samantha Schiano, Sophie Breitbart, Steve Saul.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
